messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
give me table with hex values of shades of green color

Sure! Here is a table with hex values for shades of green color:

| Shade       | Hex Value |
|-------------|-----------|
| lime        | #00FF00   |
| shamrock    | #45CEA2   |
| emerald     | #50C878   |
| java green  | #1CB53A   |
| forest green| #228B22   |
| hunter green| #355E3B   |
| olive green | #556B2F   |
| moss green  | #8A9A5B   |
| sea green   | #2E8B57   |
| teal        | #008080   |

I hope this helps!
